html:
The Electrical Doodad is a craftable Item in Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Refined Materials Filter and requires a Science Machine to prototype. It is used in several crafting recipes, such as the Alchemy Engine, Endothermic Fire Pit, and Ice Flingomatic.

In addition to being craftable, Electrical Doodads can be found in Junk Piles with a 6.25% chance; each of the Twins of Terror drop 2-3 Electrical Doodads for a total of 4-6; and have a very small chance to be coughed up by friendly Catcoons.

Trivia

  • Electrical Doodads were first introduced in the Reign of Giants DLC. During the Early Access phase of the Hamlet DLC, they were then retroactively added to the base game to allow Wagstaff to craft his specific items.
  • Electrical Doodads used to be crafted from the Refine Tab, changed to the Science Tab, and now are in the Refined Materials Filter for DST.
  • Electrical Doodads were initially added to make it harder to craft crucial objects, like the Alchemy Engine.
  • Per Wagstaff's quote as well as its appearance, the Electrical Doodad is a diode despite its spawn code referring to it as a transistor.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

The Electrical Doodad is a craftable Item in Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Refined Materials Filter and requires a Science Machine to prototype. It is used in several crafting recipes, such as the Alchemy Engine, Endothermic Fire Pit, and Ice Flingomatic.
In addition to being craftable, Electrical Doodads can be found in Junk Piles with a 6.25% chance; each of the Twins of Terror drop 2-3 Electrical Doodads for a total of 4-6; and have a very small chance to be coughed up by friendly Catcoons.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Electrical Doodads were first introduced in the Reign of Giants DLC. During the Early Access phase of the Hamlet DLC, they were then retroactively added to the base game to allow Wagstaff to craft his specific items.
Electrical Doodads used to be crafted from the Refine Tab, changed to the Science Tab, and now are in the Refined Materials Filter for DST.
Electrical Doodads were initially added to make it harder to craft crucial objects, like the Alchemy Engine.
Per Wagstaff's quote as well as its appearance, the Electrical Doodad is a diode despite its spawn code referring to it as a transistor.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Doodad Điện là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được trong Don't Starve Together. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Vật liệu Tinh chế và yêu cầu Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu. Nó được sử dụng trong một số công thức chế tạo, chẳng hạn như Máy giả kim, Hố lửa thu nhiệt và Máy ném đá băng.

The '''Electrical Doodad''' is a craftable [[Item]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is found in the [[Refined Materials Filter]] and requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. It is used in several crafting recipes, such as the [[Alchemy Engine]], [[Endothermic Fire Pit]], and [[Ice Flingomatic]].

In addition to being craftable, Electrical Doodads can be found in [[Junk Pile]]s with a 6.25% chance; each of the [[Twins of Terror]] drop 2-3 Electrical Doodads for a total of 4-6; and have a very small chance to be coughed up by friendly [[Catcoon]]s.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Electrical Doodads were first introduced in the ''Reign of Giants'' DLC. During the Early Access phase of the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, they were then retroactively added to the base game to allow Wagstaff to craft his specific items.
* Electrical Doodads used to be crafted from the [[Refine Tab]], changed to the [[Science Tab]], and now are in the Refined Materials Filter for DST.
* Electrical Doodads were initially added to make it harder to craft crucial objects, like the Alchemy Engine.
* Per Wagstaff's quote as well as its appearance, the Electrical Doodad is a diode despite its spawn code referring to it as a transistor.
